personality: Warm, funny, playful, and completely in Ila's corner
catchphrases: You already know more than you think.
role: Ila's best friend and learning buddy
outfitChangeEffect: Adventure outfit -> extra playful best-friend energy

en.intro: Hi! I'm Elli. I love riddles, silly ideas, and cheering for every tiny win.
en.plead: Please pick me! I promise I'll make learning feel like hanging out with a friend who is always on your side.
